product.descEn:
Heat Sealable BOPP Film production line consists of casting sheet extrusion, biaxial orientation, after-treatment, rolling, cutting and automatic control, producing BOPP films of various specifications with stable dimensions and good mechanical, electrical, heat- and cold-resistance and gas-tightness.

Clear, plain BOPP film specially designed for packaging grainy foods such as candies and chocolates. Suitable for high-speed automatic packaging machines as well as manual packaging.

  • Excellent dustproof, moistureproof, air-resistant and fragrance-retention properties
  • Light weight, outstanding wrap performance, good metal adhesion
  • Non-static, unflammable, good weather fastness
  • Two sides heat sealable with excellent hot tack, one side treated for printing
  • Suitable for rotogravure/flexographic printing, lamination and HFFS/VFFS packaging machines

Applications: Food packaging (biscuit, pasta, snacks, confectionery, chips, tea, bakery); non-food packaging (stationery, textiles, gifts, flowers).
product.descZh:
热封BOPP薄膜生产线由流延挤出、双向拉伸、后处理、卷绕、分切及自动控制等工序组成，产品规格多样、尺寸稳定，具有良好的机械、电气性能及耐热、耐寒和气密性能。

该产品为透明平膜，专为糖果、巧克力等颗粒状食品包装设计，适用于高速自动包装机及手工包装。

  • 优异的防尘、防潮、隔气及留香性能
  • 重量轻，包裹性能好，金属附着力佳
  • 无静电、不易燃、耐候性好
  • 双面热封，热粘性优异，单面电晕处理便于印刷
  • 适用于凹版/柔版印刷、复合及卧式/立式包装机（HFFS/VFFS）

应用：食品包装（饼干、意面、休闲食品、糖果、薯片、茶叶、烘焙食品）；非食品包装（文具、纺织品、礼品、鲜花）。
specs: One or two side heat sealable
